data.title: Ecommerce Trends: Why Walmart's view of agentic commerce is evolving
data.description: An executive overseeing AI efforts sees Walmart's AI assistant Sparky creating 'additive' ecommerce activity with ChatGPT.

data.title: Algolia: 83% of B2B sellers prioritize AI search as digital commerce grows
data.description: 44% of respondents identified site search and discovery as a top priority, ahead of ecommerce functionality (37%), support search (37%), and app search (30%).

data.title: Prologis, GIC form $1.6 billion U.S. logistics venture as ecommerce builds
data.description: The announcement reflects continued demand for customized distribution facilities tied to ecommerce growth and evolving supply chain requirements.

data.title: Court grants Perplexity temporary permission to access Amazon's site with 'agentic AI'
data.description: Perplexity's Comet browser will be able to continue using Amazon.com while an appeal proceeds.
